Welcome to BSKT Staking

Stake your BSKT tokens to earn rewards. You can choose a staking duration that suits you and claim rewards based on your stake weight.

Total Staked
Avg. Weight
Total Stakes

Balance: 0 BSKT

0 BSKT

Claimable Rewards

How it Works

Part 1

Receive % from the BSKT Rewards Pool

Fees collected from BSKT ecosystem are distributed to the BSKT Rewards Pool

More $BSKT locked = Larger % from BSKT Rewards Pool

Part 2

Time Locked is multiplied to the %

(T)multiplier: Multiply the % of BSKT Rewards Pool with the amount of time locked

1 Month = 1x

3 Months = 1.2x

6 Months = 2.5x

12 Months = 5x

Part 3

$BSKT claim during lock period

% from BSKT Rewards Pool X (T)multiplier = Claimable $BSKT

Multiplier is based on the rewards pool, not locked BSKT
